description_long: A hearty fried chicken sandwich sits on a round, brown ceramic plate alongside a generous serving of thick-cut French fries. The sandwich features a golden-brown, crispy fried chicken fillet, topped with fresh green lettuce, sliced tomatoes, and pickles, all nestled within a soft, plain white bun. The top bun is slightly domed and smooth, with no visible sesame seeds. A folded white napkin is tucked beneath the fries, adding a touch of casual dining presentation. The fries are thick, golden, and slightly irregular in shape, suggesting a rustic cut. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a classic American diner meal.
description: A fried chicken sandwich with lettuce, tomato, and pickles in a plain bun, served with thick-cut fries on a brown plate and a white napkin.
description_view_0: The sandwich and fries are fully visible, with the fried chicken, lettuce, tomato, and pickles clearly seen inside the bun; fries and napkin are prominent.
description_view_1: The sandwich is viewed from the side, highlighting the tomato slices and the fried chicken fillet, with the napkin more visible behind the fries.
description_view_2: The back of the sandwich bun is shown, with the fries and napkin taking up more of the foreground; sandwich fillings are mostly hidden.
description_view_3: The sandwich is partially turned, showing the lettuce and tomato peeking out, with fries and napkin in the foreground.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and tomato slices are layered above the fried chicken fillet, with pickles visible beneath the vegetables and all toppings distributed mainly toward the front half of the sandwich.
